caveats: Bounded to one dataset, one fixed MLP, three seeds, and Areas 1 through 3.
counter_evidence: Area holdouts have incomplete class coverage and soil indicators may remain geographic proxies.
claims.text: In the recorded Covertype experiment, matched-random macro-F1 exceeded area-holdout macro-F1 in all nine paired seed-and-area comparisons.

caveats: The evidence does not establish a universal effect size or causal mechanism.
counter_evidence: Only three model seeds and one architecture were evaluated.
claims.text: For this bounded setup, random splitting materially overestimated performance relative to whole-area holdout.

caveats: No novelty review, benchmark sweep, or cross-dataset replication was performed.
counter_evidence: The protocol deliberately used a small fixed demonstration model.
claims.text: The result proves universal spatial generalization behavior, novelty, or state-of-the-art performance.
